## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + format-check + tests)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] Follows project conventions (errors → `BioamlaError`, domain layout, lazy
      heavy imports, thin CLI) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, or areas needing scrutiny.
